players.name: Rivaldo Correa
players.bio: Clinical Colombian striker. Prolific scorer for Cibao FC, known for his movement, finishing, and power. Previously played for Cortuluá, Independiente Medellín, and Deportivo Cali. Suffered a metatarsal fracture in 2021.

players.name: Thibaut Courtois

players.name: Dani Olmo
players.bio: Dani Olmo is a dynamic Spanish attacking midfielder known for his creativity, dribbling skills, and ability to score and assist goals. He started his career in Barcelona's youth system before moving to Dinamo Zagreb and then RB Leipzig, establishing himself as a key player for both club and country.

players.name: Dani Parejo
players.bio: Dani Parejo is a veteran Spanish central midfielder renowned for his exceptional passing range, vision, and proficiency in set-piece situations. He has had a long and distinguished career in La Liga, notably with Valencia and Villarreal.

players.name: Dani Raba

players.name: David Carmo
players.bio: David Carmo is an Angolan professional footballer who plays as a centre-back. After spells at Braga and FC Porto, he moved to the Premier League with Nottingham Forest before joining Real Oviedo on loan. He is known for his physical presence and defensive capabilities.

players.name: David Costas
players.bio: David Costas is a Spanish central defender who plays for Real Oviedo. He is a consistent and reliable defender, known for his good positioning and ability to read the game. He has played for several clubs in Spain, including Celta de Vigo and Barcelona B.

players.name: Dávid Hancko
players.bio: Dávid Hancko is a Slovakian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Atlético de Madrid. He is a composed defender with good passing ability and is comfortable on the ball. He has had successful spells in the Czech Republic and the Netherlands before moving to Spain.
players.bioEs: Dávid Hancko es un futbolista profesional eslovaco que juega como defensa central para el Atlético de Madrid. Es un defensa sereno con buena capacidad de pase y se siente cómodo con el balón. Ha tenido exitosas etapas en la República Checa y los Países Bajos antes de trasladarse a España.

players.name: David López
players.bio: David López is a Spanish central defender who plays for Girona FC. A veteran presence in La Liga, he is known for his aerial ability, defensive intelligence, and leadership qualities. He had a previous spell with RCD Espanyol and played in Italy with Napoli.

players.bio: Gavi is a prodigious young Spanish midfielder who has rapidly become a key player for FC Barcelona and the national team. He is celebrated for his technical skill, tenacious style, and mature performances.
